column1: # roles.tsv — publish roles and the privilege tiers each may see (comma-separated). TAB-separated.
# `scripts/publish <role>` stages the wiki pages whose `privilege` is in the role's list,
# de-links anything pointing outside that set, and (if Quartz is set up) builds a site.
# Tiers: defined in ../.schema/privilege-tiers.tsv (default | business-sensitive | personal-sensitive by default).
# Add or edit rows to make a view for any role.
